title: Kanbus clock: return transition should exit notice left and bring clock from right

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing transition-direction redesign: Kanbus Clock notifications use push_left for both enter and return; tests/docs updated; awaiting device visual confirmation before close.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Code complete and validated: changed Kanbus clock return transition to push_left (leftward for both enter/return), updated tests + demos README. Validation: uv run python -m py_compile demos/kanbus_clock.py; uv run pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (19 passed). Triggered live lifecycle on kanbus-f6c037 for visual acceptance. Keeping this bug in_progress pending your display confirmation.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Live transition check after restart: this comment should trigger a COMMENT notice on Kanbus Clock.
